channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: PxPeek - CSS Pixel Hints - Wed Apr 15 20:01:38 UTC 2026
item.description:
Shows the pixel equivalent of relative CSS size values inline, as comment-style inlay hints. Supports CSS, SCSS, SASS, and LESS. Example: width: 42rem /*672px...
vendor: Stian Larsen downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.stianl.pxpeek

item.title: Copy Tab Path - Wed Apr 15 00:57:10 UTC 2026
item.description:
Option+Click (Mac) or Alt+Click (Windows/Linux) on an editor tab to copy the file's project-relative path to the clipboard.
vendor: Neel Kirit downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.neelkirit.copy-tab-path

item.title: Git Changed Files - Wed Apr 15 00:55:27 UTC 2026
item.description:
Lists all files changed in the current Git repository in a sidebar panel. Single-click any file to open it in the editor.
vendor: Neel Kirit downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.neelkirit.git-changed-files

item.title: betool - AI Code Assistant - Sat Apr 11 22:06:26 UTC 2026

vendor: beTool IA downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.betool.plugin

item.title: Livesport LLM - Wed Apr 15 08:09:02 UTC 2026
item.description:

item.title: SpeQA - Test Management System - Wed Apr 15 04:53:35 UTC 2026

item.title: CodeSense AI - Thu Apr 16 08:05:20 UTC 2026

vendor: ivov downloads: 5 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: run.lisette.plugin
